metadata.description: Known pre-tournament injuries/suspensions for 2025 NCAA Tournament teams
metadata.data_status: APPROXIMATE - must verify against RotoWire/247Sports before tournament

injuries.note: If OUT, Iowa State loses primary ball-handler. AdjEM drops ~3-5 pts.
Played through but not 100%. Monitor game-time status.
UNC's 19-14 record reflects full-season struggles, not a specific injury. Already captured in AdjEM.

clean_teams_note: Most 2025 tournament teams entered relatively healthy. The 2025 field was notably injury-free compared to typical years. Verify late-breaking injury reports 24-48 hours before tournament games.
monitoring_sources: Pre-game press conferences (day before each game)
